overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: SNMP Trap integration uses Vector to receive SNMP Trap messages sent by network devices. Through structured log data, you can monitor network device alarms, faults, and status changes to implement unified network device event management.

items.title: Multi-version Support
items.description: Supports SNMP v1, v2c, and v3 protocol Trap messages

items.title: Secure Transmission
items.description: Supports v3 authentication and encryption for enterprise security requirements

items.title: MIB Parsing
items.description: Converts OID to readable names and extracts VarBinds information

items.title: Real-time Reception
items.description: Immediate reception of device alarm information for fast response

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: SNMP Trap messages will be parsed into the following structured fields:

steps.title: Configure Sender
steps.description: Configure network devices to send SNMP Traps to Vector:

tips.title: Device Configuration Example
tips.content:
**Cisco Device Configuration:**
`snmp-server host 172.24.0.5 traps version 2c public`
`snmp-server enable traps`

**Huawei Device Configuration:**
`snmp-agent target-host trap address udp-domain 172.24.0.5 params securityname public v2c`
